CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Nullable(UInt8));
SELECT and(value = 1, value IS NOT NULL) FROM test_table;
SELECT and(value = 1, value = 1, value = 0) FROM test_table;
SELECT and(value = 0, 1, intDiv(1, value + 1)) FROM test_table WHERE id < 5;
SELECT and(value = 1, (SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) > 0) FROM test_table;
WITH (SELECT sum(value) FROM test_table) AS total_value SELECT and(total_value > 2, total_value < 10);
SELECT and(value IS NOT NULL, (SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE value > 0) > 0) AS result FROM test_table;
SELECT and(0, (SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE value = 1) > 0) AS check1 FROM test_table;
SELECT and(value = 1, value = 0, value IS NULL) FROM test_table WHERE id = 3;
SELECT and(NULL, (SELECT value = 1 FROM test_table)) FROM test_table;
SELECT and(1, (SELECT and(0, 1) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1), 0) FROM test_table;
SELECT and(if(value = 1, 1, 0), (SELECT and(value = 1) FROM test_table) > 0) FROM test_table;
